hooks.command: gcd="$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null)" || { printf '{"decision":"deny","reason":"Guard cannot start: git repository root unavailable."}\n'; exit 0; }; case "$gcd" in /*) root="$(dirname "$gcd")" ;; *) root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" ;; esac; bash "$root/.agents/hooks/guard-destructive-shell.sh"

gcd="$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null)" || { printf '{"decision":"deny","reason":"Guard cannot start: git repository root unavailable."}\n'; exit 0; }; case "$gcd" in /*) root="$(dirname "$gcd")" ;; *) root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" ;; esac; bash "$root/.agents/hooks/guard-secret-paths.sh"

gcd="$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null)" || { printf '{"decision":"deny","reason":"Guard cannot start: git repository root unavailable."}\n'; exit 0; }; case "$gcd" in /*) root="$(dirname "$gcd")" ;; *) root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" ;; esac; bash "$root/.agents/hooks/guard-repository-writes.sh"
